body:
## Solution summary

Implemented and pushed the fix to PR 1646:

https://github.com/link-assistant/hive-mind/pull/1646

Root cause: `checkForExistingComment()` only read the first GitHub comments page, so on PR 1643 it saw an old `Ready to merge` comment on page 1 and missed the latest session-ending log on page 2. The fix adds `--paginate` before applying the existing session-scoped dedupe logic in [src/solve.auto-merge-helpers.lib.mjs](/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1776551843126/src/solve.auto-merge-helpers.lib.mjs:67).

What changed:
- Added paginated PR comment lookup.
- Added the regression test in [tests/test-ready-to-merge-pagination-1645.mjs](/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1776551843126/tests/test-ready-to-merge-pagination-1645.mjs:1).
- Wired the regression into `npm test`.
- Added a patch changeset.
- Added the full investigation and saved artifacts under [docs/case-studies/issue-1645/README.md](/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1776551843126/docs/case-studies/issue-1645/README.md:1).
- Merged latest `main`, resolved the `package.json` test-script conflict, and restored the setup `.gitkeep` marker out of the PR diff.

Verification:
- Local checks passed: `npm test`, `npm run lint`, `npm run format:check`, docs validation, changeset validation, `.mjs` syntax check, line-limit check, duplication check, and `git diff origin/main...HEAD --check`.
- GitHub Actions run `24615832960` completed successfully.
- PR is ready for review, not draft, and GitHub reports `mergeStateStatus: CLEAN`.
- Working tree is clean on `issue-1645-53daead64de1` at `24785cc94773f0528440f345a23b37f42c9f0586`.

Next useful steps:
1. Review PR 1646’s case-study artifacts and diff.
2. Merge PR 1646 when the maintainers are satisfied.

---

*Monitored by hive-mind with --auto-restart-until-mergeable flag*

We should add custom linting rule, that will prevent us from repeating this error. So that all calls to gh tool or any GitHub API, without `--paginate` should immediately be an error at a level of link checker. So that will be impossible to repeat. So we should fix all places there we yet don't have `--paginate`. And use all places where we have `--paginate` as a basis for custom lint rule check.

We need to ensure all changes are correct, consistent, validated, tested, logged and fully meet each and all discussed requirements (check issue description and all comments in issue and in pull request). Ensure all CI/CD checks pass.
